title: NeoSpawn and home
description: Neo is a set spawn plugin and homes plugin
body:
[ ![erly acces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/uuZ6VPVMvP)
# 🟢 NeoX

**NeoX** is a modern **Paper/Spigot plugin**, written in **Java 21**, inspired by EssentialsX.  
It provides the most useful server utility commands in a **lightweight, simple, and modular** way.  

---

## ✨ Features

- 🏠 **Homes**
  - `/home [name]` → teleport to a home
  - `/sethome [name]` → set a home (multi-homes supported)

- 🌍 **Spawn**
  - `/spawn` → teleport to spawn
  - `/setspawn` → set the server spawn point

- 🔄 **Player Teleportation** *(planned)*
  - `/tpa <player>` → send a teleport request
  - `/tpaccept` / `/tpdeny` → accept or deny requests

- ⏪ **Back Command** *(planned)*
  - `/back` → return to your last location (death or teleport)

- ❤️ **Utility Commands** *(planned)*
  - `/heal` → restore health
  - `/feed` → restore hunger
  - `/fly` → toggle flying
  - `/god` → toggle invincibility

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the latest **NeoX.jar** release.  
2. Place it inside your server’s `plugins/` folder (Paper/Spigot **1.21.x**).  
3. Restart your server.  

---

## 🔑 Permissions

| Command     | Permission       | Default |
|-------------|------------------|---------|
| `/neox`     | `neox.use`       | ✅ Everyone |
| `/spawn`    | `neox.spawn`     | ✅ Everyone |
| `/setspawn` | `neox.setspawn`  | ❌ OP only |
| `/home`     | `neox.home`      | ✅ Everyone |
| `/sethome`  | `neox.sethome`   | ✅ Everyone |
